data.title: Prominence Energy Initiates Bowsprit-1 Site Abandonment
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

Prominence Energy Limited ( (AU:PRM) ) has shared an announcement.

Prominence Energy Limited has commenced the abandonment and site remediation of the Bowsprit-1 Project Lease, following the decision to relinquish the lease. The company has appointed Petroleum Coordinators Inc. to manage the project, with Select Oilfield Services LLC and Gulf Inland Inc. assisting in the plug and abandonment operations, ensuring an efficient and safe process.

More about Prominence Energy Limited

Prominence Energy Limited is an Australian Securities Exchange listed company based in Perth, focusing on high ROI opportunities in conventional oil and gas, as well as emerging sectors like Helium, Green Energy, and Green Hydrogen. The company holds interests in the Gulf of Mexico and has investments in uranium and solution-mined salt caverns for energy reserves and carbon capture.

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Buy

Current Market Cap: €943.2K

data.title: Mare Group Announces Shareholders’ Meeting with Key Agenda Items
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

Mare Engineering Group SpA ( (IT:MARE) ) has shared an announcement.

Mare Group S.p.A. has announced the publication of the notice for its upcoming Ordinary and Extraordinary Shareholders’ Meeting, which will address several key agenda items. These include the adoption of stock-option and stock grant plans, the delegation of authority to the Board of Directors to increase share capital, and the provision of variable compensation for executive board members. The decisions made at this meeting could significantly impact the company’s financial strategies and shareholder engagement.

More about Mare Engineering Group SpA

Mare Engineering Group S.p.A. is a digital engineering company listed on Euronext Growth Milan. It operates in Italy and internationally, focusing on innovation through enabling technologies.

data.title: Alkane Resources Reports Strong Financial Growth Amid Rising Gold Prices
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

Alkane Resources Ltd ( (AU:ALK) ) has shared an announcement.

Alkane Resources Ltd reported a significant increase in its financial performance for the half-year ending December 2024, with a 36% rise in revenue to A$121.5 million and a 6% increase in profit after tax to A$13.1 million. This growth was driven by higher gold sale prices and increased production at the Tomingley site, highlighting the company’s robust position in the gold market. The company’s cash, bullion, and listed investments totaled A$42.4 million, demonstrating strong financial health and operational efficiency.

More about Alkane Resources Ltd

Alkane Resources Ltd is a company operating primarily in the gold mining industry. The company focuses on the production and sale of gold, with operations centered around its Tomingley site.

Average Trading Volume: 17,934

data.title: Evergrande Subsidiary Faces Winding-Up Order Amid Continued Trading Suspension
data.description:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

China Evergrande Group ( (HK:3333) ) has shared an update.

China Evergrande Group has announced that the High Court of Hong Kong issued a winding-up order against its subsidiary, Tianji Holding, with the Official Receiver appointed as provisional liquidator. Trading of the company’s shares remains suspended, highlighting ongoing financial difficulties and uncertainty for shareholders and investors.

More about China Evergrande Group

China Evergrande Group is a major player in the real estate industry, primarily focused on property development and management. The company has been facing financial challenges and is currently in liquidation, impacting its operations and market positioning.

data.title: Seasystems Secures Major FLNG Anchoring System Contract
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

The latest announcement is out from Scana ASA ( (DE:1MP) ).

Scana-owned Seasystems AS has secured a significant contract to deliver an anchoring system for a Floating Liquefied Natural Gas project, reflecting its expertise in mooring solutions. The collaboration, initiated in early 2023, underscores Seasystems’ position as a leader in the mooring segment and highlights the value of its advanced technologies in the maritime industry.

More about Scana ASA

Scana ASA is an industrial owner specializing in technology and services for the energy and offshore industries, with a history tracing back to the early 1900s. It is headquartered in Bergen, employs over 600 people, and is known for innovation and quality in several niche markets. Seasystems, a subsidiary, provides mooring solutions for floating structures and offers services like project management and engineering.

data.description:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

Titan Cement International N.V. ( (TTCIF) ) has provided an announcement.

Titan Cement International S.A. has announced the sale of its 75% stake in Adocim Cimento Beton Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. in Türkiye as part of its strategy to align with long-term growth objectives. The transaction, valued at 87.5 million US dollars, is an effort to strengthen Titan’s portfolio and explore reinvestment opportunities, while ensuring operational continuity for stakeholders in the region.

More about Titan Cement International N.V.

TITAN Group is a prominent international company in the construction materials and infrastructure sector, focusing on innovative solutions for sustainable growth. Operating in over 25 countries, primarily in developed markets such as the United States and Europe, TITAN employs over 5,700 people. Known for its commitment to sustainability, the company aims for carbon neutrality by 2050 and is listed on Euronext and the Athens Stock Exchange.

data.description:

  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

Japan Airport Terminal Co ( (JP:9706) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Japan Airport Terminal Co., Ltd. has announced a change in its representative director, effective April 1, 2025, as part of a broader management transition. This shift in leadership could impact the company’s strategic direction and operational focus, with further details on board structure and new director candidates to be revealed after the shareholder meeting in June 2025.

More about Japan Airport Terminal Co

Japan Airport Terminal Co., Ltd. operates in the aviation industry, primarily focusing on managing and operating airport terminals. The company provides services related to the maintenance and management of terminal facilities, offering amenities and retail opportunities for travelers.

Finbar Group Limited ( (AU:FRI) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Finbar Group Limited has appointed Ms. Melissa Chan as an Alternate Director for Executive Chairman John Chan. With over 25 years of experience, including extensive expertise in real estate and financial processes, Ms. Chan will also serve as Chief Commercial Officer, strengthening the company’s strategic planning and stakeholder management capabilities.

Finbar Group Limited operates in the real estate industry, focusing on land acquisitions, development, urban regeneration, and investment across multiple asset classes such as multifamily, condominium, office, and retail.
